ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the event */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizer of the event */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES event_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the athlete in the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the athlete in the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered in the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "is_team_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if the result is for a team event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team if the result is for a team event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the athlete */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the athlete */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_profiles_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registration */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, coach, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the coach */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the coach's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the athlete in the team (e.g., captain, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the athlete joined the team */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team membership was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
